intro.subtitle: Premium Luxury Transportation
intro.title: Move in Silence & Style
intro.description: Experience premium chauffeur services with transparent pricing, professional drivers, and exclusive vehicles designed for your comfort.

fields.terms: I agree to the terms and privacy policy

addons.title: Enhance Your Journey
addons.note: Selected add-ons will be reflected in your final quote.

tracking.title: Track My Booking
tracking.subtitle: Use your booking reference and email to view status and trip details.
tracking.cancelText: This action cannot be undone. Only pending or confirmed bookings can be cancelled.
